Title:
Our cybersecurity and client experience experts, Chad Adams, Technology & Security Consultant; Michael Giardina, VP of Client Experience; and special guest Jeremiah School, President of DOT Security are digging into how cybersecurity can act as a stress test for growing businesses.

This conversation goes beyond the basics... exploring purpose-led security, clearly defining problems, aligning technology to how work actually happens, and designing systems that support growth instead of slowing it down.

What we'll cover:
❗️How security can enable growth instead of blocking it
❗️Treating cybersecurity as a business system and risk management strategy, not an IT add-on
❗️What intentional design looks like at the leadership level

This is for leaders responsible for outcomes, not just technology, who are ready to understand how security exposes deeper system issues and how intentional design can unlock sustainable growth.

📅 Wednesday, April 29th
⏰ 1 PM CT
📍 Live at https://hubs.ly/Q048TFd50
